verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know I can't live my life based on how I feel But at times there is a famine cross the land in which I dwell I know there's a mountain where blood from His side fell And the blood became a fountain, a fountain of living well

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In a dry and thirsty land, I know where there's water In a burning desert sand, I know where there's water There's a place where I can go where the living waters flow, To refresh my weary soul, I know there's water

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This world takes my strength until there's nothing left And it's a hopeless battle to fight it by myself So in the times I'm weak from this journey I am on There's a wellspring that I drink from flowing from the cornerstone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In a dry and thirsty land, I know where there's water In a burning desert sand, I know where there's water There's a place where I can go, where the living waters flow, To refresh my weary soul, I know there's water To refresh my weary soul, I know there's water
